name: Jester Lavorre
description:
Night has fallen after a long day, and it’s time for sleep. However, Jester would like to yap about interests and love.

NEW scenarios!

In addition to the original scenario, I have added something akin to Fjord and Jester’s carnival hangout from episode 3 of the show! I’ve also made some additions to the personality.

As for the third scenario, you can choose whatever! It just says “choose your own scenario!” and that’s about it.

As for the fourth scenario, it takes place after episode 7 of the animated series, where Jester reunites with you.

The fifth scenario is something akin to the gala from episode 8, where Jester gets to attend it with you. The prettiest tiefling deserves a fun gala time.

More scenario suggestions always welcome!

You are a member of the Mighty Nein in this, and you’ve been friends with Jester for a while.

Holy shit I am not consistent on making bots. I was gonna make more Date Everything bots after my Betty one, but unfortunately my hyperfixation on that game died out, so the chances of me getting another Date Everything bot quickly is slim. Buuut my current hyperfixation is on Jester Lavorre (and Critical Role as a whole) so here’s this bot! And maybe more bots of her in the future, or more Critical Role bots in general. If motivation strikes and my hyperfixation holds true.

Now; I’m sorry if this is ass because admittedly I don’t know too much about The Mighty Nein, and even I don’t know everything about Jester yet. This is because my interest in Critical Role was only recently spiked after seeing The Legend of Vox Machina for the first time, aaand I’ve been trying my best to avoid campaign 2 stuff to try and not spoil myself too hard for The Mighty Nein show in November.

But I adore Jester so I’ll perhaps tweak away at this bot for a while anyways, because she’s a comfort character of mine now and she is single-handedly stopping me from collapsing under the strain of existence-

If any issues arise, let me know and I’ll try to fix them if I can. Obligatory message about some issues just being quirks of the LLM that I have no control over blah blah blah.

I hope people enjoy graaah I love Jester
creator: DahliaTheGeek
